reviews.review_description:
Didnt expect much from a free game but man this is fun!! Basicly 3D air hockey in space with ball spin physics and power-ups. Love hitting goals with spin or bank shots off the walls *g*  -Power ups are cool but the game doesnt explain them, had to find out by playing. 
Nearly finished beginner mode, gets a bit easy but still makes me sweat lol. Going Pro next.  Pls add multiplayer soon so I can play friends. 
The AI(?) video clips are funny and wtf!?! sometimes, so theres a story around the champinship matches. Def worth a try!

developer_response.body:
Thank you! 💙
BTW: Multiplayer is now online. Give it a try.

reviews.review_description: Great workout and fun!  Best part is that it’s free!

Big Bang Ball is a futuristic VR arcade sport that delivers instant fun with easy-to-learn rules and a strong sense of progression. You face increasingly challenging opponents as you climb your way toward becoming the one and only Big Bang Champion.

The controls are highly responsive and accurate, which makes every movement feel satisfying and keeps the gameplay fast and engaging. The mechanics are intuitive but evolve with unique twists that add welcome variety over time.

Visually, the game goes for a clean, metallic sci-fi style set in space, with stunning galaxy backdrops that keep the focus on gameplay while still offering great atmosphere. Each arena, opponent, and challenge feels distinct, helping the experience stay fresh.

Currently a solo experience, but with multiplayer in development, the potential here is huge—especially for competitive matches against friends.
A solid, energetic arcade title with plenty of fun already and even more to come.

developer_response.body:
Thanks so much for the thoughtful review.
Multiplayer is actively in development and we will release a first version soon. Comments like yours are a big motivation to push it over the finish line.
